topics.title: Riley Martin and Alien Encounters
topics.summary: The studio discusses the captivating yet bizarre performance of Riley Martin, a man who claims to have been visited by aliens and serves as a messenger for their message.

topics.title: Radio Industry Ratings and Satellite Migration
topics.summary: The studio discusses recent Arbitron ratings, the transition of listeners to satellite radio following Howard Stern's move, and the performance of various terrestrial morning shows.

topics.title: Radio Ratings and Listener Call Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores the nuances of radio ratings for various programs while engaging in a lengthy, provocative conversation with a caller regarding his personal experiences.

topics.title: The Sopranos and Film Industry Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses recent episodes of The Sopranos, the career of Sharon Stone, and a new slasher film project involving mob themes.

topics.title: Allegations of Affair on Skating with the Stars
topics.summary: The studio features a phone call from a man claiming to be the former boyfriend of actress Christie Swanson, who alleges she had an affair with her skating partner during a television production.

topics.title: Skating with the Stars Scandal
topics.summary: The studio features a caller recounting his sexual history and alleged involvement with a figure skater from Skating with the Stars.

topics.title: Chris Kattan Interview and Film Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features Chris Kattan discussing his transition from Saturday Night Live, his personal life, past relationships with models, and the upcoming release of the independent film Adam and Steve.

topics.title: Hostility Between Alec Baldwin and Sean Hannity
topics.summary: The studio plays a clip of a heated exchange between Alec Baldwin and Sean Hannity regarding political comments and professional agreements.

topics.title: Radio Industry Analysis and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the impact of satellite radio on traditional broadcasting, critiques various media personalities including Alec Baldwin and Starr-Jones, and reacts to recent industry trends.

topics.title: Sex Machine Demonstrations and Porn Star Interviews
topics.summary: The studio introduces a webmaster and three porn stars to demonstrate various sex machines while discussing their personal histories and experiences in the adult industry.

topics.title: Adult Film Performers and Mechanical Devices
topics.summary: The studio features adult film performers discussing their experiences, personal sexual preferences, and the use of mechanical devices during a live demonstration.

topics.title: Demonstration of Modified Industrial Machinery
topics.summary: The show features a demonstration where women use various modified industrial machines, such as cake mixers and reciprocating saws, for sexual purposes.

topics.title: Reaction to Women Using Power Tools
topics.summary: The studio reacts to a video of women using power tools and discusses the lack of inhibition shown by the participants.

topics.title: Studio Cleanup After Machine Demonstration
topics.summary: The studio discusses the aftermath of a demonstration involving industrial-style machines, the resulting cleanup efforts, and upcoming segments including a film festival preview and listener interactions.

topics.title: Media Coverage of Wilmer Valderrama and Environmental Concerns
topics.summary: The studio discusses the media coverage of Wilmer Valderrama's candid interview, reviews a list of the world's sexiest women from FHM, and addresses concerns regarding global warming.

topics.title: Daily News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including household habits, immigration policy debates, updates on the Iraq war, celebrity news regarding Jennifer Aniston and Tom Cruise, and legal proceedings involving 9/11 conspirators.
